entry_command: bash -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/eval_artifacts && /snap/google-cloud-cli/current/bin/gcloud storage cp gs://gunay-chess-experiments-us-central2/runs/dfm/dfm-modern-l12-h8-v21-dfm/checkpoints/step0180000/state.npz /tmp/dfm_ckpt.npz && export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:. && /tmp/venv/bin/python scripts/evaluate_elo.py --e1 "/tmp/venv/bin/python scripts/uci_dfm.py --bt4-pb models/BT4-1024x15x32h-swa-6147500-policytune-332.pb.gz --dfm-ckpt /tmp/dfm_ckpt.npz --layers 12" --e2 "/tmp/venv/bin/python scripts/uci_bt4.py --bt4-pb models/BT4-1024x15x32h-swa-6147500-policytune-332.pb.gz" --games 100 --time 0.1 | tee /tmp/lc0jaxhuman/artifacts/tournament_results.log'
